🏰 Line Tower Wars
00:00.000
PB —

Build (click your lane)

Send (attack the enemy lane)

How to play

Maze your lane with towers to kill incoming creeps. Send creeps at the enemy to raise your income and drain their lives. Leak = lose a life. Drop the enemy to 0 lives as fast as you can.

Keys: 1–3 pick tower · Q/W/E send · Esc deselect · Space restart
